policy: Each exception must name the vulnerability id, package, reason, and a review date. Remove entries when the pin is upgraded or the advisory is withdrawn. New findings without an exception fail the blocking audit gate. Prefer a dedicated dependency-upgrade PR over long-lived ignores.

exceptions.reason: Transitive via optional LiteLLM lock only. Upgrade with litellm profile in a dedicated dependency PR.
